core_payload.content:
# Integrations

## 1. Role
Integrations will become the governed connector fabric of N1Hub, allowing external services to join the graph through explicit capability boundaries, trust classes, and operability rules rather than through ad hoc plugin sprawl.

## 2. Future Connector Contract
The integration layer will carry clearer health monitoring, retry and recovery policy, secret handling, event contracts, and agent-operability distinctions so the system can tell the difference between co-pilot-safe connectors, autonomy-safe connectors, and connectors that require stronger human control.

## 3. Operational Consequence
External capability will deepen without dissolving sovereignty. Connectors will widen the system’s reach while staying inspectable, governable, and compatible with vault law.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Integrations supports To Dig Deep by letting the ecosystem connect outward without abandoning control inward.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Integrations defines the future governed connector fabric of N1Hub: clearer capability boundaries, better health monitoring, stronger agent-operability rules, and tighter sovereign control over how outside systems join the graph.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
